title: As better chatbots get harder to build, AI turns to simulated worlds
abstract: Struggling to create smarter chatbots? No worries—AI is now turning to simulated worlds! Imagine your chatbot not as a cold responder but as a playful companion on adventures and knowledge quests. As better bots become harder to build, AI explores virtual realms—the perfect stage for your intelligent assistant to shine. Give it a try; you might just find something magical!
abstract_zh: 你还在为打造更聪明的聊天机器人发愁吗？别担心，AI现在转向了模拟世界！这就像给机器人穿上魔法袍，让它在虚拟世界里自由穿梭。想象一下，你的聊天机器人不再是冷冰冰的回答，而是能与你一起冒险、学习新知识的小朋友。As better chatbots get harder to build, AI turns to simulated worlds——让虚拟世界为你的智能助手加油吧！来试试看，你会发现不一样的精彩！
